name: OurFamilyWizard
keyWeaknesses: Per-parent billing doubles the cost for families
US-centric design with no Australian localisation
Data hosted in the United States
headline: CoRaise vs OurFamilyWizard: The Australian Alternative
description: See how CoRaise compares to OurFamilyWizard for Australian families. Lower cost, Australian data hosting, and Evidence Act compliance.
whySwitchPoints: Save $200-750/year per family with CoRaise's split billing model
Data hosted in Sydney, not the United States
Australian school terms and state holidays built in
Evidence Act 1995 (Cth) compliant court exports with SHA-256 hashing
One subscription covers both parents - no per-parent billing

faq.question: Is CoRaise accepted in Australian courts like OurFamilyWizard?
faq.answer: CoRaise exports are designed specifically for Australian courts. Every message is SHA-256 hashed and time-stamped, and exports comply with the Evidence Act 1995 (Cth). OurFamilyWizard was designed for US courts and does not offer Evidence Act compliance.

faq.question: How much cheaper is CoRaise than OurFamilyWizard?
faq.answer: CoRaise costs $120-$180/year for the whole family. OurFamilyWizard costs $330-$900/year because both parents must pay separately. A family can save $200-$750/year by switching to CoRaise.

faq.question: Can I transfer my records from OurFamilyWizard to CoRaise?
faq.answer: CoRaise does not currently offer a direct import from OurFamilyWizard. We recommend downloading your OurFamilyWizard records before cancelling, then starting fresh on CoRaise. All new communications will be recorded with full court-ready integrity from day one.

faq.question: Does OurFamilyWizard have Australian school terms?
faq.answer: No. OurFamilyWizard uses US school calendars and holidays. CoRaise is pre-loaded with school terms and public holidays for every Australian state and territory, updated each year.

faq.question: Where is my data stored with each platform?
faq.answer: OurFamilyWizard stores all data in the United States. CoRaise stores all data exclusively in Sydney, Australia (ap-southeast-2), ensuring compliance with Australian privacy laws and data sovereignty requirements.
